message:
bd-3oaig.10: add performance metrics panel with running averages

- Add RunningStats struct tracking last 20 samples per phase with
  average/min/max computation and formatted summary output
- Push parse/layout/render timings to RunningStats after each computation
- Enhance side panel metrics display:
  - Total time (sum of all phase timings)
  - Node/edge counts from parsed IR
  - Layout quality stats (crossings, bends, ranks, max rank width)
  - Running averages shown when 2+ samples collected (avg (min-max) [N])
- Add 7 unit tests: RunningStats empty/single/multiple/eviction/summary
  format, and cache initialization verification

Combined with existing side panel timings, JSONL telemetry, cache stats,
debounce tracking, and budget indicators, this satisfies the structured
performance metrics acceptance criteria.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
